key.name: date-format
key.description: Display format for BS date in the top panel: long, compact, or numeric.

key.name: use-nepali-digits
key.description: Whether to render numeric values using Nepali digits.

key.name: accent-color
key.description: Highlight color used in popup title and current day cell.

key.name: today-border-color
key.description: Border color used for highlighting the current BS date cell.

key.name: today-fill-color
key.description: Fill color used when today highlight style includes cell fill.

key.name: today-text-color
key.description: Text color used inside today's highlighted BS cell.

key.name: today-highlight-style
key.description: Highlight style for current BS date cell: border, fill, or both.

key.name: panel-text-color
key.description: Text color for the BS date indicator in the top panel.

key.name: popup-background
key.description: Background color for the calendar popup container.

key.name: show-gregorian-hints
key.description: Show small Gregorian day numbers in each BS date cell.
